about.title: About Hotel
about.subtitle: Where Nature Meets Luxury
about.description: Hotel is a unique resort complex located in the heart of the picturesque nature. We have created a place where every guest can escape from the city noise and enjoy harmony with nature without compromising on comfort and luxury.

nature.title: Nature
nature.description: Surrounded by ancient forests and crystal-clear lakes

luxury.title: Luxury
luxury.description: Premium service and attention to every detail

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Comprehensive programs for body and soul

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.subtitle: The Taste of Nature in Every Dish
restaurant.description: Our restaurant offers a unique gastronomic journey through the flavors of nature. We use only the freshest local ingredients, creating dishes that amaze the imagination.

spa.title: SPA & Wellness
spa.subtitle: Body and Soul Restoration
spa.description: Our SPA center offers comprehensive relaxation and restoration programs. From traditional massages to modern wellness procedures — everyone will find something for themselves.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.subtitle: Adventures and Discoveries
experiences.description: Discover all the possibilities of nature recreation. From active adventures to peaceful contemplation of the surrounding beauty.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Unforgettable Moments
events.description: Hotel is the perfect place for special events. From weddings to corporate gatherings.

weddings.title: Weddings
weddings.description: Create an unforgettable wedding in harmony with nature

corporate.title: Corporate Events
corporate.description: Team building and conferences in nature
